name: Emma Wilson
bio: Met during freshman orientation. My go-to person for late-night study sessions and spontaneous coffee runs.

name: Carlos Wilson
bio: Senior engineer at my first job who took me under his wing. Meet for coffee every couple of weeks.

name: Lea Henderson
bio: Grew up three houses down. We have been through everything together since first grade.

name: Jordan Burke
bio: Met backpacking through Portugal. We still swap recommendations and plan future trips together.

name: Yuki Nakamura
bio: We bonded over Haruki Murakami at our building monthly book club. Best reading recommendations ever.

name: Marcus Rivera
bio: Freelance designer I have collaborated with on several projects. Always pushes ideas further.

name: Sophie Mensah
bio: My thesis partner from grad school. We survived countless 3am submission crunches together.

name: Dev Patel
bio: Fellow founder I met at a startup weekend. We exchange ideas and celebrate small wins.

name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Childhood best friend who moved to a different city. We catch up over long video calls every few weeks.

name: Liam Chen
bio: Met at a hackathon three years ago. We have been collaborating on side projects ever since.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: We met in an art elective and bonded over terrible coffee and good music. Still share playlists weekly.

name: Noah Thompson
bio: Gym buddy turned close friend. We used to train together every morning. Need to reconnect soon.
